features.name: ranger-favored-enemy
features.safe_summary: Hunter's Mark is always prepared, costs no spell slot to cast (twice per Long Rest), and deals +1d6 bonus damage to your marked target on every weapon hit.
features.rules_summary: Hunter's Mark is always prepared, costs no spell slot to cast (twice per Long Rest), and deals +1d6 bonus damage to your marked target on every weapon hit.

features.name: ranger-weapon-mastery
features.safe_summary: You can use the Mastery property of 2 weapon types you are proficient with. You can swap your choices whenever you finish a Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: You can use the Mastery property of 2 weapon types you are proficient with. You can swap your choices whenever you finish a Long Rest.

features.name: ranger-deft-explorer
features.safe_summary: Gain Expertise in one skill, +10 ft Speed (not in Heavy Armor), and you ignore Difficult Terrain.
features.rules_summary: Gain Expertise in one skill, +10 ft Speed (not in Heavy Armor), and you ignore Difficult Terrain.

features.name: ranger-spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Wisdom-based half-caster. Prepare spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + half your Ranger level (rounded down). Spell slots per the half-caster table.
features.rules_summary: Wisdom-based half-caster. Prepare spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + half your Ranger level (rounded down). Spell slots per the half-caster table.

features.name: ranger-fighting-style
features.safe_summary: Choose one permanent fighting posture: Archery (+2 ranged attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC in armor), Dueling (+2 melee damage one-handed), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability mod to off-hand damage).
features.rules_summary: Choose one permanent fighting posture: Archery (+2 ranged attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC in armor), Dueling (+2 melee damage one-handed), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability mod to off-hand damage).

features.name: ranger-conclave-subclass
features.safe_summary: Choose your Ranger Conclave at level 3. Your conclave grants features at levels 3, 7, 11, and 15.
features.rules_summary: Choose your Ranger Conclave at level 3. Your conclave grants features at levels 3, 7, 11, and 15.

features.name: ranger-roving
features.safe_summary: Your Speed increases by 10 ft, and you gain a Climb Speed and Swim Speed each equal to your Speed.
features.rules_summary: Your Speed increases by 10 ft, and you gain a Climb Speed and Swim Speed each equal to your Speed.

features.name: ranger-tireless
features.safe_summary: As a Magic action, gain 1d8 + Wis mod Temporary HP (usable Wis mod times per Long Rest). Short Rests also reduce your Exhaustion level by 1.
features.rules_summary: As a Magic action, gain 1d8 + Wis mod Temporary HP (usable Wis mod times per Long Rest). Short Rests also reduce your Exhaustion level by 1.

features.name: ranger-natures-veil

grants_actions.name: ranger-natures-veil
grants_actions.summary: Bonus Action: become Invisible until the start of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier per Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Bonus Action: become Invisible until the start of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier per Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Bonus Action: become Invisible until the start of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier per Long Rest.

features.name: ranger-foe-slayer
features.safe_summary: Once per turn, add your Wisdom modifier to an attack roll or saving throw d20 roll involving your Hunter's Mark target.
features.rules_summary: Once per turn, add your Wisdom modifier to an attack roll or saving throw d20 roll involving your Hunter's Mark target.

features.name: ranger-asi-4
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.

features.name: ranger-extra-attack
features.safe_summary: You can attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action on your turn.
features.rules_summary: You can attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: ranger-subclass-feature-6
features.safe_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants an additional feature at level 6 that expands your subclass toolkit.
features.rules_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants an additional feature at level 6 that expands your subclass toolkit.

features.name: ranger-expertise-second-skill
features.safe_summary: Gain Expertise in 2 skills you are proficient with: your proficiency bonus is doubled for those skills.
features.rules_summary: Gain Expertise in 2 skills you are proficient with: your proficiency bonus is doubled for those skills.

features.name: ranger-conjure-barrage

grants_actions.name: ranger-conjure-barrage
grants_actions.summary: Once per Long Rest: throw a weapon or fire a piece of ammunition to create a 60-ft cone of spectral copies; each creature in the cone takes 3d8 damage (Con save for half).

features.safe_summary: Once per Long Rest: throw a weapon or fire a piece of ammunition to create a 60-ft cone of spectral copies; each creature in the cone takes 3d8 damage (Con save for half).
features.rules_summary: Once per Long Rest: throw a weapon or fire a piece of ammunition to create a 60-ft cone of spectral copies; each creature in the cone takes 3d8 damage (Con save for half).

features.name: ranger-asi-8
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.

features.name: ranger-lands-stride
features.safe_summary: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. You have Advantage on saves against magical plants that restrain or slow movement.
features.rules_summary: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. You have Advantage on saves against magical plants that restrain or slow movement.

features.name: ranger-third-level-slots
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 3rd-level spell slots: 2 slots at Ranger level 9, increasing to 3 slots at level 11.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 3rd-level spell slots: 2 slots at Ranger level 9, increasing to 3 slots at level 11.

features.name: ranger-subclass-feature-10
features.safe_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants an additional feature at level 10 that further defines your hunting specialty.
features.rules_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants an additional feature at level 10 that further defines your hunting specialty.

features.name: ranger-conjure-volley

grants_actions.name: ranger-conjure-volley
grants_actions.summary: Once per Long Rest: fire a piece of ammunition or throw a weapon to fill a 40-ft radius, 20-ft tall cylinder; creatures inside take 8d8 damage (Dex save for half).

features.safe_summary: Once per Long Rest: fire a piece of ammunition or throw a weapon to fill a 40-ft radius, 20-ft tall cylinder; creatures inside take 8d8 damage (Dex save for half).
features.rules_summary: Once per Long Rest: fire a piece of ammunition or throw a weapon to fill a 40-ft radius, 20-ft tall cylinder; creatures inside take 8d8 damage (Dex save for half).

features.name: ranger-asi-12
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.

features.name: ranger-fourth-level-slots
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 4th-level spell slots: 1 slot at Ranger level 13, increasing to 2 slots at level 15, then 3 slots at level 17.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 4th-level spell slots: 1 slot at Ranger level 13, increasing to 2 slots at level 15, then 3 slots at level 17.

features.name: ranger-subclass-feature-14
features.safe_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants a high-tier feature at level 14 that defines your late-game capabilities.
features.rules_summary: Your Ranger Conclave grants a high-tier feature at level 14 that defines your late-game capabilities.

features.name: ranger-conjure-barrage-improvement
features.safe_summary: Your Conjure Barrage improves: you can now use it twice per Long Rest, and the damage increases to 5d8.
features.rules_summary: Your Conjure Barrage improves: you can now use it twice per Long Rest, and the damage increases to 5d8.

features.name: ranger-asi-16
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each, or take a feat. No score can exceed 20.

features.name: ranger-fifth-level-slots
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 5th-level spell slots: 1 slot at Ranger level 17, increasing to 2 slots at level 19.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 5th-level spell slots: 1 slot at Ranger level 17, increasing to 2 slots at level 19.

features.name: ranger-feral-senses
features.safe_summary: You don't have Disadvantage on attacks against Invisible or hidden creatures, as long as you can hear them and aren't Blinded or Deafened.
features.rules_summary: You don't have Disadvantage on attacks against Invisible or hidden creatures, as long as you can hear them and aren't Blinded or Deafened.

features.name: ranger-epic-boon
features.safe_summary: At level 19, instead of a standard ASI you gain an Epic Boon feat — a powerful endgame enhancement that can push an ability score above 20.
features.rules_summary: At level 19, instead of a standard ASI you gain an Epic Boon feat — a powerful endgame enhancement that can push an ability score above 20.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Spellcasting is tracked as a Ranger feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.safe_summary: Favored Enemy is tracked as a Ranger feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content

features.name: Deft Explorer
features.safe_summary: Deft Explorer is tracked as a Ranger feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content
